name: Dradis Pro API
description: REST API for Dradis Pro, an open-source collaboration and reporting platform for information security teams. Manages projects, nodes, issues, evidence, notes, content blocks, document properties, tags, and attachments. Uses Token-based authentication and project scoping via Dradis-Project-Id header.
